message:
fix: Complete ast_executor builtin functions and bytes unpacking

ast_executor.zig - Extended runtime eval() builtin support:
- int(), float(), str(), bool() type conversion functions
- abs() for absolute value of numbers
- min(), max() with multiple argument support
- type() returning type name as string
- repr() for string representation
- Handle attribute-based function calls (obj.method())
- Changed unknown function error from NotImplemented to NameError

ceval.zig - Added bytes sequence unpacking:
- unpackBytes() for a, b, c = b"abc" style unpacking
- Star unpacking support: a, *b, c = b"hello"
- Changed unsupported type error from NotImplemented to TypeError
